tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
             These words are my own[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Threw some chords together[/tab]
[ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]C/E[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
The combination [ch]D[/ch] -  [ch]E[/ch] -  [ch]F[/ch]
[tab]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
It's who I am, it's what I do[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
No one's gonna let it down for you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]
I Try to focus my attention[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]C/E[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
But I feel so A -  D -  D[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
I need some help, some inspiration[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
(But it's not coming easily)[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]
Whoah oh...Trying to find the magic[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
Whoah oh...Trying to write a classic[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]                             [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
Whoah oh...Don't you know, don't you know, don't you know?[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]
Whoah oh...Waste-bin full of paper[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Clever rhymes, see you later[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
These words are my own[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
From my  heart flown[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F2[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
There's no other way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
To bet-ter say[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F2[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
I love you, love you...[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Read some Byron, Shelly and Keats[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
Recited it over a Hip-Hop beat[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]
I'm having trouble saying what I mean[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
With dead poets and drum machines[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I know I had some studio time booked[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
But I couldn't find a killer hook[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Bb[/ch]
Now you've gone & raised the bar right up[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
Nothing I write is ever good enough[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
These words are my own[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
From my  heart flown[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F2[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
There's no other way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
To bet-ter say[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F2[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
I love you, love you...[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
These words are my own[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
From my  heart flown[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F2[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
There's no other way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
To bet-ter say[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F2[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
I love you, love you...[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]
(I'm getting off my stage[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]
The curtains pull away[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
No hyperbole to hide behind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]
 My naked soul exposes[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]
Whoah.. oh.. oh.. oh.. Whoah.. oh..)[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]
Whoah oh...Trying to find the magic[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
Whoah oh...Trying to write a classic[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]
Whoah oh...Waste-bin full of paper[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Clever rhymes, see you later[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
These words are my own[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
From my  heart flown[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F2[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
There's no other way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
To bet-ter say[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F2[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
I love you, love you[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
Please these words are my own[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
From my  heart flown[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F2[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
There's no other way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
To bet-ter say[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F2[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
I love you, love you...[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
    These words are my own[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]C/E[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
They're fro-om my heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]F2[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
  I love you, love you..[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
That's all I got to say,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
Can't think of a bet-ter way,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
And that's all I've got to say,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
I love you, is that okay[/tab]
